data.body:
A lot of leaders think softening the message makes them kinder.

Often it just makes them harder to understand.

Clear does not mean harsh. Direct does not mean careless. In many cases, clarity is the more respectful choice.

data.body:
One practical shift that helps immediately

Stop asking “Does that make sense?”
Start asking “What’s your takeaway?”

Those are not the same question. One checks for politeness. The other checks for understanding.
